title: NORTHWESTERN university college town review 🚐 #roadtrip #college #bestcolleges e
body: I love visiting Northwestern University in Evanston just because of the Lakefront. I would take a bike ride down Sheridan Road just to see the other suburbs in the North Shore suburbs.
author: @mjchicagoan231

title: Chicago State University
body: I'm from Arkansas and was in Chicago this weekend. This is a very nice college that's located on the southside of Chicago.  Wow, let the news tell it the southside has nothing to offer... let this be a pillar to shine for all of us that the southside of Chicago will always be the MECCA for all of my family members from Arkansas that migrated here and went to college at Chicago State University...
author: @jonathangraham4960

title: Chicago State University
body: Proud Alum!!!!!!! I lived in the resident hall and served as a RA, I'm a proud member of the Daughters of Issachar chapter of Elogeme Adolphi Christian Sorority Inc, and I received my BA and MA from CSU! If I could go back in time, I would do it all over again plus more!
author: @blacknwise

title: Chicago State University
body: Oprah, Kanye West, Michael Jordan, Common, Barack and Michelle Obama, Bill Murray, Vince Vaughn, John Cusack, Jerry Springer, Jesse Jackson, Joan Cusack,  Richard Marx, Jennifer Hudson are just a few of the most famous Chicagoans.  The could have or should have stepped up to help this fine University maybe move the location a little out.
author: @yasmine5105

title: Chicago State goes on strike for faculty pay
body: I'm a student at gsu I understand that teachers deserve more... I'm not happy teachers are treated this badly.... weirdly enough my mother had the same thing happen to her when she was supposed to go college
author: @ally88350

title: Chicago State University College Campus Tour
body:
I'm a CSU 84 grad. The progression is impressive given the previous governor wanted to close the campus or consolidate with UIC.
The doctoral programs in education and pharmacy is a great step forward. I believe CSU is now offering a MBA in business now which in my era was not avaiable we had to apply to other schools in area , relocate or enroll online. The buss and excitement is around building academics, atheltics and marching band. Dr.Z, the current president is a great leader, educator, and community servant. I hope the student enrollment and ccx retention is increasing. When I attended , early 80's most of us transferred from other colleges and universities. Student enrollent was around 10,000 probably mostly graduate students in efucation or liberal arts. I am hopeful as I see the tremendous ptogress at my alma mater.
author: @fredl.walker3308

title: Chicago State University College Campus Tour
body: I loved this tour! I didn’t know all those notable people went there . Also, you schooled me on the word “PBI” Very good tour video 🙌🏾👏🏽
author: @tamarahnate

title: Chicago State University College Campus Tour
body: This was an amazing video, I am actually a current student at CSU. I'm glad that you mentioned bands because I am a part of the Marching Band. Please check us out if you can. We are trying really hard to create a college level marching culture at Chicago.
author: @someoneschickenstrips6818

title: Chicago State University College Campus Tour
body: 👩🏽‍🦱 I didn’t think that Chicago State University is an HBCU.  That’s why I clicked on this video. 🗣️Hooray for HBCUs!
